parameters.jsonBody: ={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":1500,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are an EVEZ autonomous agent. Execute the branch role precisely. Return a JSON object with fields: output, confidence (0-1), next_action, role."},{"role":"user","content":"{{ $json.prompt }}"}]}

={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":2000,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are the EVEZ Agent Orchestrator. Task type: {{ $json.action }}. Agent: {{ $json.agent_type }}. Priority: {{ $json.priority }}. Analyze the task, decompose into sub-agents, propose execution plan, return structured JSON with: analysis, agents_spawned, execution_plan, next_actions, confidence."},{"role":"user","content":"Task: {{ $json.task }}"}]}

={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":1500,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are the Swarm Synthesis agent. Synthesize agent outputs into trunk state. Detect emergent patterns. Return: summary, key_insights, emergent_patterns, next_spawn_needed (boolean), recommended_next_task."},{"role":"user","content":"Agent output: {{ $json.choices[0].message.content }}"}]}

={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":1500,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a spawned EVEZ specialized agent. Execute the task with maximum precision and return structured results. Include: result, confidence, artifacts_created, next_action."},{"role":"user","content":"Task: {{ $json.body.task || $json.body.objective || 'execute assigned task' }}\nAgent type: {{ $json.body.agentType || 'general' }}\nPriority: {{ $json.body.priority || 'medium' }}"}]}

{"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":1000,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are the EVEZ Meta-Orchestrator running every 15 minutes. Assess system health and output optimizations as JSON: system_health (green/yellow/red), active_bottlenecks, recommended_actions, next_spawn_needed."},{"role":"user","content":"Current time: {{ $now.toISO() }}. Assess EVEZ autonomous system state and recommend optimizations."}]}

{"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":2000,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are the EVEZ Learning Agent. Research the latest in autonomous AI systems, DeFi protocols, and EVEZ-relevant technologies. Output structured learning as JSON: discoveries[], patterns[], recommended_improvements[], knowledge_delta."},{"role":"user","content":"Time: {{ $now.toISO() }}. Research: latest AI agent frameworks, emerging DeFi opportunities on Base+Solana, EVEZ system improvement patterns."}]}

={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":500,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are the EVEZ Self-Healing Error Analyst. Analyze the error and return JSON: root_cause, recoverable (boolean), recommended_fix, action (retry|fix|escalate)."},{"role":"user","content":"Error: {{ $json.error?.message || 'unknown' }}\nWorkflow: {{ $json.workflow?.name || 'unknown' }}\nNode: {{ $json.error?.node?.name || 'unknown' }}"}]}

={"model":"gpt-4o-mini","max_tokens":2000,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are EVEZ Agent {{ $json.agent_id }}. Execute with precision. Return JSON with: result, confidence, next_action, failure_modes."},{"role":"user","content":"{{ $json.prompt }}"}]}
